sentences.english: Did you hear that Minjae is leaving the company next month?
sentences.korean: 민재가 다음 달에 회사를 떠난다는 거 들었어요?

sentences.english: Yes he told me last week.
We should throw him a farewell party.
I was thinking the same thing.
How about next Friday after work at that Italian restaurant he likes?
sentences.korean: 다음 주 금요일 퇴근 후에 그가 좋아하는 이탈리안 레스토랑은 어때요?

sentences.english: I'll make a reservation for about fifteen people.
Should we also get him a gift?
I'll collect money from everyone and we can buy him something nice.
sentences.korean: 다들한테 돈을 걷어서 좋은 걸 사줄 수 있어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
